itemListElement.reviewBody:
I have studied in this school my whole life I passed 12th from this school. And trust me this is the worst school....this school has so much politics about teachers...if you don't study in the school teachers tution they may ruin your future....
The principal sujoy biswas is so rude. And in ram mohon mission we don't make memories we make nightmares.... If you want to traumatize your kids go for this school otherwise don't. This school has very bad faculty. Especially this school has no extra
curricular activities only studying.  Mousumi mam was the best principal but from class 6 you all will know what is hell. Also in this school all the students are traumatized by the teachers...  When I passed out from this school i knew what is life tbh. I wish I could give 0 star but there is no option. And in this school if you're an avarage student no any teachers will like you.

itemReviewed.name: Ram Mohan Mission High School - Jodhpur Gardens,Lake Gardens

itemListElement.reviewBody: This is one of the worst school in kolkata. They don't know how to treat with students . They are very poor. They took money from each students but didn't give any proper answer sheet. During exam, When students want to need any extra sheet they don't want to give any extra sheet to them. Why? How much poor they are? Infact they didn't care our children. They didn't check the Id card of their students when they leaved/reached in school. Actually this school management is very poor.

itemReviewed.name: Ram Mohan Mission High School - Jodhpur Gardens,Lake Gardens

itemListElement.reviewBody: Studied here for 13 years and completed my ICSE from here. One of the best academic institutions that would prepare one for the future.  Highly recommended.

itemReviewed.name: Ram Mohan Mission High School - Jodhpur Gardens,Lake Gardens

itemListElement.reviewBody: Teaching is moderate.....completing the syllabus comes before teaching..... The infrastructure sucks...... Faculty —some are very good some very bad.... Except a few elites in each subjects rest are just targeting to complete the syllabus....

itemReviewed.name: Ram Mohan Mission High School - Jodhpur Gardens,Lake Gardens

itemListElement.reviewBody: It's one of the leading ICSE School in Kolkata. The school is Co-ed which trys to develop positive mindset and respect towards opposite gender. To be honest there is no doubt regarding academics record of the school. Weekly tests and exams are taken to prepare the students in the best way. The school lacks Co-curricular activities which turns out to be the major set back of the school. There is no playground till class 7.Many experienced teachers have left the school in the recent year. The administration part is quite good and impressive. Till class X the school is highly recommendable.
